review_summary.college_name: Bharti Vidyapeeth's Institute of Pharmacy (Aided Wing) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review for Bharti Vidyapeeth's Institute of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Around 20/60 were placed. The highest was 10 LPA and the lowest is 6 LPA, it differs. No internships are offered by the college. Usually, good startups visit the campus. You can become a QA, QPC head, and enter into a manufacturing unit of a pharmaceutical company.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, chemicals which are properly arranged, peaceful library. I'm not aware of the hostel. The food served in the canteen isn't that healthy and tasty but better than nothing. They offer a wide variety of beverages though.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides excellent teaching.

content.Placements: In Bharti Vidyapeeth College of Pharmacy, our batch had more than 100 students. The salary package offered to me was of 2 LPA. Top companies come for the internship. Very few of students got internship from the college. Around 40% of the students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided by our college were average. They didn't provide Wi-Fi for the studies. But the classrooms were very wide and big that all students can sit comfortably. They have hostels but the rooms in hostels are very small and a room had to be shared by three students.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma) - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: All facilities are available here like a hostel, mess, clean washrooms, etc.

content.Placements: Placements of our college are very good. Many companies are visiting here to offer jobs. The lowest salary offered to me is Rs. 15,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities of our college are very good, and there is no need to worry about it. Classrooms are very clean. All types of books required for the course is available in the library. The library is open for 24 hours, and whenever you can study in the library or keep books from the library to your room. They maintain the building neat and clean. All the facilities like hostel, mess and clean washrooms are available.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Bharti Vidyapeeth's Institute of Pharmacy (Aided Wing).

content.Placements: Almost 100% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 20 LPA. Almost 60% of students got internships. Our college is spacious. The top role offered is a doctor.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good facilities. Our college is spread over 36 acres of land. Classrooms are spacious. They provide separate labs. The college was established in 2001. Our college's overall rank is approximately 70. I would recommend joining this college.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are highly qualified. They teach us very well. The teaching quality is good. Almost 100% of students pass the exams. They are Ph.D. holders.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Satisfying college as we got good placement in good reputed companies.

content.Placements: 1) Nearly about 80% student were placed with me in the course. 2) The highest package offered was10 lakh and the lowest was 7 lacs. 3) Some top recruiting companies are : Sun Pharmaceuticals, Novozymes, Cipla, Dr Reddy's Laboratories, Lupin, Aurobindo, Zyduscadila, Glenmark Pharmaceuticals, Abbott India, Biocon and Wockhardt. 4) Almost 90% of the students got internship in various companies.
content.Infrastructure: In our course literally all the facilities are available. We have highly qualified and excellent teaching staff. Classrooms are quite spacious and with unique designs. Labs are equipped with the latest technology and has all the medicines available. Library has more than 50 thousand books which also include books out of course for knowledge and life lessons. Hostel is not that good but an average. Food quality is also average. Medical facilities are up to its mark and they give an equal importance to sports.

overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, and the college has delivered good placements.

admission_process.title: SVS Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SVS Institute of Technology admission2025 is completely based on the entrance exam as per respective courses. The institute offers courses, such as BTech, BPharma, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. To get admitted to SVS Institute of Technology, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The application process at SVSIT is conducted both online or offline. Read the following article to know more aboutSVS Institute of Technologycourse admission2025.

SVS Institute of Technology admission 2025is entrance-based. The institute also accepts national-level entrance exams like GATE, GPAT, etc. for admission to specific courses such as MTech, MPharma, etc. The institute offers more than 12 courses (including specialisations) in various streams such as Pharmacy, Engineering, Management, etc. Check out the following table for details aboutSVS Institute of Technology course admissions2025:

SVS Institute of Technology admissionsis completely entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at SVS Institute of Technology is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: SVS Institute of Technology Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website, i.e., https://www.svsit.ac.in/student-registration-form for admission to the various programme. However, candidates also apply offline. To apply offline students must download the application form available at the official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The institute admits students based on entrance exams such as TS EAMCET, TS PGECET, etc. for courses like BPharma, MPharma among others. For the final selection, it also considers the candidates' academic performance.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theSVS Institute of Technology feeto confirm their seats in the institute.
